steps.instruction: This protocol performs sample aliquoting from a single-channel reservoir to up to 24 custom cryotubes. The sample order is down columns and then across rows (A1, B1, C1, D1, A2, B2, etc.) --- * [NEST 1 Well Reservoir 195 mL](https://labware.opentrons.com/nest_1_reservoir_195ml) * [Opentrons P1000 GEN2 single-channel electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette?variant=5984549142557) * [Opentrons 96 Tip Rack 1000 µL](https://labware.opentrons.com/opentrons_96_tiprack_1000ul)
Input the number of samples to process (1-24), the transfer volume (in µl), and the mount side for your P1000 GEN2 single-channel pipette.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
